heroSubtitle: Inspect public metadata from a ZelfProof. No face or credentials needed.
qrUploadHelp: Upload a PNG or JPEG of the HumanID QR. We decode the QR and fill the proof string for preview.
errorReadProof: Could not read HumanID from QR preview response.
qrExtractSuccess: HumanID extracted from QR. Add a verifier key if needed, then preview.
verifierKeyPlaceholder: Unlocks additional fields if set during creation
apiOfficialAfter: (parameters, responses, and examples). This demo calls POST /v2/human-id/preview via previewHumanId, which matches that workflow on the current API. Related:
apiBaseUrlNote: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send JSON with Content-Type: application/json and Authorization: Bearer <access token> (same JWT as this demo after sign in).
apiPreviewEndpointDesc: Returns non-sensitive preview fields for a proof (for example whether a password is required) inside the usual signed data envelope.
apiPreviewQrEndpointDesc: Use when the user provides a PNG or JPEG of the HumanID QR. The API decodes the payload and returns a zelfProof you can send to the preview call above. Same JSON headers as preview. Optional verifierKey when the proof uses one.
apiBullet1: This demo uses previewHumanId and, for QR images, previewZelfIdQr from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
apiBullet2: Success responses follow the Verifik pattern: a data object (and often a signature when signing is enabled for your project).
paramZelfProofDesc: HumanID string from paste, or from QR extraction in this form
paramVerifierKeyDesc: If the proof was created with a verifier key
paramQrCodeDesc: Image as a data URL (data:image/png;base64,...) or another form accepted by the API (this demo builds a data URL from the file)
paramVerifierKeyQrDesc: Same semantics as on preview when the proof uses a verifier key

0.title: Preview ZelfProof
0.description: Reference for inspecting public metadata from a proof before you decrypt or use it elsewhere.

1.title: Create a ZelfProof
1.description: Encrypt your public fields and face capture into a new HumanID string you can store or share.

2.title: Decrypt a ZelfProof
2.description: Unlock the identity payload inside a proof by matching it to a live face.

3.title: Create QR ZelfProof
3.description: Generate a QR that embeds a HumanID so people can scan it from a screen or wallet.

4.title: Liveness detection
4.description: Run a dedicated check that a face image looks live rather than spoofed. Separate from HumanID preview.
